title: Regula Evidence Format — Manifest (v1.0)
description: Schema for manifest.json at the root of a regula.evidence.v1 pack. See docs/spec/regula-evidence-format-v1.md for normative text.

format.description: Format identifier. MUST equal 'regula.evidence.v1' for v1.x packs.

format_version.description: Format revision within v1. '1.0' is the initial release; '1.1' adds the optional signing + timestamp blocks; further minor versions may add optional fields.

schema_uri.description: URL to this JSON Schema document.

regula_version.description: Semver of the Regula build that produced the pack.

project_directory.description: Directory name that was scanned, for disambiguation.

hash_algorithm.description: Digest algorithm used for file-level integrity. v1 fixes this to SHA-256.

files.description: Ordered list of every file in the pack (excluding the manifest itself).

filename.description: POSIX relative path from pack root.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of file contents.

form.description: Which pack variant this is. 'full_annex_iv' is the default multi-section layout; 'sme_simplified_annex_iv' is a single-file pack per Article 11(1) second subparagraph.

interim_format_disclosure.description: Free-text disclosure explaining a pack variant whose official format the Commission has not yet published.

signing.description: Optional in v1.1+. Ed25519 signature over the canonical manifest JSON (with the `signing` field stripped). A consumer that cannot verify the signature SHOULD warn but MUST NOT reject the pack unless strict mode is requested.

algorithm.description: Signature algorithm. v1.1 fixes this to Ed25519.

canonical_serialization.description: How the signed bytes are produced from the manifest. v1.1 fixes this to sorted-key, no-whitespace JSON encoded as UTF-8, with the `signing` field removed before serialisation.

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature (64 raw bytes → 88 base64 chars).

public_key.description: Base64-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo PEM of the Ed25519 public key. Consumers decode the base64, then load the PEM.

timestamp_authority.description: Reserved for v1.1. MAY contain an RFC 3161 timestamp token of the manifest's hash.
